zh.lifeSummary: Margery Dayvell是Roger Dayrell和Joan Agmundesham Dairell的女兒，於大約1373年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾利林斯同 代雷爾。她於大約1387年與John Chetwode在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1399年之後在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Dayvell was born about 1373, in Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, England as the daughter of Roger Dayrell and Joan Agmundesham Dairell. She married John Chetwode about 1387, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1399, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery Dayvell est née environ 1373, à Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, fille de Roger Dayrell et Joan Agmundesham Dairell. Elle a épousé John Chetwode environ 1387, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée après 1399, à Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Dayvellは約1373年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリリングストーン デイレルでRoger DayrellとJoan Agmundesham Dairellの娘として生まれた。約1387年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJohn Chetwodeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1399年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Dayvell(은)는 대략 1373년 영국 벅잉함실르 릴링스톤 데이렐에서 Roger Dayrell(와)과 Joan Agmundesham Dairell의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1387년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 John Chetwode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1399년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Margery Dayvell родилась около 1373 г. в местности лиллингстоун деирелл, буккингхамшир, Англия. Её родителей звали Roger Dayrell и Joan Agmundesham Dairell. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Chetwode около 1387 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1399 г. в местности Англия.
